hero.sub: Manage your VMs and LXC containers from the palm of your hand. Locally or via our secure cloud relay.

features.title: Everything you need to
features.sub: A native, fast and secure interface. Everything you do on the Proxmox web UI, available from your phone.

0.title: Local Mode
0.desc: Connect directly to your Proxmox on your LAN network. Zero latency, zero middleman.

1.title: Cloud Relay
1.desc: Access from anywhere via our encrypted WebSocket tunnel. Your Proxmox IP stays private.

2.title: VNC Console
2.desc: Control the graphical console of your VMs directly from your phone. Auto-landscape mode.

3.title: Full Control
3.desc: Start, Stop, Restart your VMs and LXC containers. Real-time CPU & RAM monitoring.

4.title: Proxmox Backup Server
4.desc: Add your PBS servers, browse Datastores, track backup and prune jobs.

5.title: Maximum Security
5.desc: 15-minute JWT, secure iOS/Android storage (Keychain), AES-256-CBC credential encryption.

6.title: Push Notifications
6.desc: Smart alerts if a node goes down, a backup fails, or a critical update is available.

7.title: iCloud Sync
7.desc: Your servers and credentials sync automatically across all your Apple devices.

how.title: Up and running in
how.sub: Simple setup, immediate results. No complex network configuration, no VPN.

0.title: Download MyProx
0.desc: Install the app from TestFlight (iOS) or the Play Store (Android). Create your account in 30 seconds.

1.title: Add your server
1.desc: Enter your Proxmox IP, credentials and choose the mode: Local (LAN network) or Cloud (remote access).

2.title: Cloud Mode? Deploy the agent
2.desc: Run our Go agent on your local network (Docker in one command). It establishes the secure tunnel automatically.

3.title: Manage from anywhere
3.desc: Start, Stop, Restart. CPU and RAM monitoring. VNC Console. All from your phone wherever you are.

roadmap.title: What's ready,
roadmap.sub: MyProx evolves quickly. Here's our transparent progress.

pricing.sub: Start for free, go Premium when you need more.
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for managing your personal homelab.
pricing.note: Secure payment via Stripe. No commitment. Cancel anytime from the app.

download.betaNote: Beta access via TestFlight available now —

docs.title: MyProx Documentation
docs.sub: Everything you need to know to install, configure, and use MyProx.
docs.quickstartS0: Download the app via TestFlight (iOS) or the Play Store (Android)
docs.quickstartP2: No additional server configuration is needed for local mode.
docs.localP1: Local mode directly connects the app to your Proxmox on the same Wi-Fi network.
docs.localPrereq: Requirement: Your phone and your Proxmox server must be on the same network.
docs.cloudP1: Cloud mode allows you to access your Proxmox from anywhere, via a Go agent deployed locally.
docs.cloudArchCode: Mobile App → MyProx API → Cloud Relay → Agent → Proxmox
docs.cloudP2: The agent token is automatically provided when you add a server in Cloud mode in the app.
docs.securityI0: Authentication: JWT (15-minute access token + refresh token)
docs.securityI1: Mobile storage: expo-secure-store (iOS Keychain / Android Keystore)
docs.securityI3: Cloud tunnel: WebSocket TLS, per-server JWT token
docs.apiP1: The REST API runs on localhost:3000 (local) or api.myprox.app (cloud).

pricingPage.metaDesc: Discover MyProx plans. Start for free, upgrade to Premium at €4.99/month for unlimited access.
pricingPage.faq0Q: Can I cancel at any time?
pricingPage.faq0A: Yes, with no commitment. Your subscription remains active until the end of the billing period.
pricingPage.faq1Q: Is my Proxmox data stored on your servers?
pricingPage.faq1A: No. Your credentials are AES-256 encrypted in the database. In cloud mode, traffic passes through our relay without being stored.
pricingPage.faq2A: Yes. The local agent establishes an encrypted WebSocket connection to our relay. Your Proxmox IP never goes out to the internet.
pricingPage.faq3Q: How many servers can I add in Premium?
pricingPage.faq3A: An unlimited number of local and cloud servers. Manage your entire homelab from one app.
pricingPage.faq4Q: What is the difference between Local and Cloud mode?
pricingPage.faq4A: Local mode connects directly to your Proxmox on your Wi-Fi network. Cloud mode uses our Go agent for access from any network.
